recipe.title: Spaghetti Bolognese
recipe.description: This simple spaghetti Bolognese recipe is a classic. Cooked in the oven with rosemary, bacon and red wine, it's seriously packed with flavour.

ingredients.name: rashers of dry-cured higher-welfare smoked streaky bacon

steps.descr: Peel and finely chop the garlic and onions, pick and...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely chop the garlic and onions, pick and finely chop the rosemary, then finely slice the bacon.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely chop the garlic and onions, pick and finely chop the rosemary, then finely slice the bacon.

steps.descr: Heat a splash of oil in a casserole pan on a medium...
steps.instructions: Heat a splash of oil in a casserole pan on a medium heat, add the bacon, rosemary, garlic and onion and cook for 5 minutes, or until softened, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Heat a splash of oil in a casserole pan on a medium heat, add the bacon, rosemary, garlic and onion and cook for 5 minutes, or until softened, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Add the minced beef, breaking it apart with the back of...
steps.instructions: Add the minced beef, breaking it apart with the back of a spoon, then cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until starting to brown, then pour in the wine. Leave to bubble and cook away.

on_enter.say: Add the minced beef, breaking it apart with the back of a spoon, then cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until starting to brown, then pour in the wine. Leave to bubble and cook away.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, drain and tip the sun-dried tomatoes into a...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, drain and tip the sun-dried tomatoes into a food processor, blitz to a paste, then add to the pan with the tomatoes. Stir well, break the plum tomatoes apart a little.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, drain and tip the sun-dried tomatoes into a food processor, blitz to a paste, then add to the pan with the tomatoes. Stir well, break the plum tomatoes apart a little.

steps.descr: Cover with a lid then place in the oven for 1 hour,...
steps.instructions: Cover with a lid then place in the oven for 1 hour, removing the lid and giving it a stir after 30 minutes – if it looks a little dry at this stage, add a splash of water to help it along.

on_enter.say: Cover with a lid then place in the oven for 1 hour, removing the lid and giving it a stir after 30 minutes – if it looks a little dry at this stage, add a splash of water to help it along.

steps.descr: About 10 minutes before the time is up, cook the...
steps.instructions: About 10 minutes before the time is up, cook the spaghetti in boiling salted water according to the packet instructions.

on_enter.say: About 10 minutes before the time is up, cook the spaghetti in boiling salted water according to the packet instructions.

steps.descr: Once the spaghetti is cooked, drain, reserving a mugful...
steps.instructions: Once the spaghetti is cooked, drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water, then return to the pan with a few spoons of Bolognese, a good grating of Parmesan and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

on_enter.say: Once the spaghetti is cooked, drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water, then return to the pan with a few spoons of Bolognese, a good grating of Parmesan and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

steps.descr: Toss to coat the spaghetti, loosening with a splash of...
steps.instructions: Toss to coat the spaghetti, loosening with a splash of cooking water, if needed.

on_enter.say: Toss to coat the spaghetti, loosening with a splash of cooking water, if needed.

steps.descr: Divide the spaghetti between plates or bowls, add a good...
steps.instructions: Divide the spaghetti between plates or bowls, add a good spoonful of Bolognese to each, then serve with a fine grating of Parmesan.

on_enter.say: Divide the spaghetti between plates or bowls, add a good spoonful of Bolognese to each, then serve with a fine grating of Parmesan.
